Our Story

Clean Beauty,
Handcrafted with Love

Ladybug Spot was born out of a passion for natural fragrance and clean beauty. Every product is handcrafted in small batches to ensure freshness, quality, and a truly personal experience.

Our formula uses organic coconut oil, beeswax, cocoa butter, and vitamin E — with premium phthalate-free fragrance. No toxins, no fillers, just beautiful scent.
